steps.title: Read the two points
steps.content: January $13$ is $2$ days after January $11$, and January $15$ is $4$ days after January $11$. From the scatterplot, the points are $(2,6)$ and $(4,15)$.

steps.title: Find the average rate
steps.content: Average rate of change is slope between the two points. $$\frac{15-6}{4-2}=\frac{9}{2}$$ $$\frac{9}{2}=4.5$$ The answer is 4.5.
